UpdateAppBlbPolicy.blbId: ID of the BLB to operate on
UpdateAppBlbPolicy.type: Protocol used by the listener port
UpdateAppBlbPolicy.policyList: List of listener policies to update
UpdateAppBlbPolicy.policyList.priority: Priority, range 1-32768, must be unique among existing entries. Lower value means higher priority; rules are matched in descending priority order. priority and description cannot both be empty.
UpdateAppBlbPolicy.policyList.description: Description. Max 200 characters. priority and description cannot both be empty.
